query:
SELECT id, start_date, end_date, allocation_percentage, include_weekend
             FROM allocations 
             WHERE resource_id = $1 
             AND id != $2
             AND (
                 (start_date <= $3 AND end_date >= $3) OR
                 (start_date <= $4 AND end_date >= $4) OR
                 (start_date >= $3 AND end_date <= $4)
             )
